metadata.method: Web search of justice.gov, oig.hhs.gov, state medical boards, and news sources
metadata.notes: Out-of-sample validation — none of these providers were in the LEIE training labels. The model identified them purely from billing patterns.

matches.name: Phlebxpress
matches.summary: Owners pled guilty to $7M Medicare fraud — false billing for overstated travel mileage. Each sentenced to 15 months.
matches.why_not_in_leie: Company NPI not excluded — only individual owners (Santibanez, Hazard) excluded under personal names in 2024

matches.name: Advanced Clinical Laboratories, Inc.
matches.summary: Corporate Integrity Agreement with OIG for False Claims Act violations — added diagnosis codes not provided by physicians. $500K+ recovery.
matches.why_not_in_leie: Signed Corporate Integrity Agreement as alternative to exclusion

matches.name: Hemal Mehta
matches.summary: DOJ indictment — 10 counts, conspiracy to distribute controlled substances (oxycodone, morphine, oxymorphone) 2016-2018. FBI/HHS-OIG/TBI investigation.
matches.why_not_in_leie: Indicted but not yet convicted/excluded — exclusion lags years behind indictment

matches.name: Natera, Inc.
matches.summary: Qui tam complaint for false claims to government health programs. $8.25M class action settlement for inaccurate prenatal tests. DOJ investigation closed 2024 with no finding of wrongdoing.
matches.why_not_in_leie: DOJ investigation closed with no wrongdoing finding — no basis for exclusion

matches.name: Care Dx, Inc.
matches.summary: DOJ investigation (closed 2024, no wrongdoing); qui tam whistleblower lawsuit alleging improper test bundling and kickbacks; derivative settlement pending June 2026.
matches.why_not_in_leie: DOJ investigation closed with no wrongdoing finding — no basis for exclusion

matches.name: Stephen Dubin
matches.summary: Two complaints filed with Nevada State Board of Medical Examiners (Case No. 23-11289-1 and 23-11289-2). Details not publicly available.
matches.why_not_in_leie: Board complaints only — no conviction or OIG action
